channel.title: The Rundown AI
channel.description: Your daily AI news and insights

item.title: Google tops OpenAI's math breakthrough — 9 to 1
item.description: Google dominates AI math competition, solving 9 problems to OpenAI's 1. Plus: Build an AI secretary that plans your entire day effortlessly.
item.content:encoded: Google dominates AI math competition, solving 9 problems to OpenAI's 1. Plus: Build an AI secretary that plans your entire day effortlessly.

item.title: Exclusive interview: Sundar Pichai on AI's flip phone moment
item.description: Sundar Pichai on AI's pivotal moment: Exclusive interview revealing Google's next big leap in artificial intelligence innovation and strategy ahead.
item.content:encoded: Sundar Pichai on AI's pivotal moment: Exclusive interview revealing Google's next big leap in artificial intelligence innovation and strategy ahead.

item.title: OpenAI cracks an 80-year math belief
item.description: OpenAI's reasoning model disproves 80-year math theory autonomously, marking a breakthrough in AI-driven scientific discovery and original research capabilities.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's reasoning model disproves 80-year math theory autonomously, marking a breakthrough in AI-driven scientific discovery and original research capabilities.

item.title: Gemini's busy agentic day at Google I/O
item.description: Google I/O unveils Gemini as the agentic engine powering all products, with new launches including Omni, Flash, and a revamped Search experience driving AI automation.
item.content:encoded: Google I/O unveils Gemini as the agentic engine powering all products, with new launches including Omni, Flash, and a revamped Search experience driving AI automation.

item.title: Musk's OpenAI case runs out of time
item.description: Musk's OpenAI lawsuit dismissed on technicality as jurors rule in favor of the AI company, ending months of heated legal battle and billion-dollar claims.
item.content:encoded: Musk's OpenAI lawsuit dismissed on technicality as jurors rule in favor of the AI company, ending months of heated legal battle and billion-dollar claims.

item.title: AI anger comes for Claude (Monet)
item.description: AI anger comes for Claude (Monet): Artist reveals how people dismiss real artwork when they think AI made it, exposing reflexive hostility toward machine-generated art online.
item.content:encoded: AI anger comes for Claude (Monet): Artist reveals how people dismiss real artwork when they think AI made it, exposing reflexive hostility toward machine-generated art online.

item.title: OpenAI takes Codex mobile
item.description: OpenAI brings Codex to mobile with ChatGPT app, enabling AI coding agents to run for hours while you manage tasks remotely. Plus, automate marketing assets with ChatGPT Images 2.0.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI brings Codex to mobile with ChatGPT app, enabling AI coding agents to run for hours while you manage tasks remotely. Plus, automate marketing assets with ChatGPT Images 2.0.

item.title: The enterprise shift OpenAI saw coming
item.description: Ramp’s latest AI Index just showed Anthropic leading adoption among its paid business users for the first time, a 4x adoption surge since 2025 that may tell the story of why OpenAI has been drastically shifting its priorities throughout 2026.
item.content:encoded: Ramp’s latest AI Index just showed Anthropic leading adoption among its paid business users for the first time, a 4x adoption surge since 2025 that may tell the story of why OpenAI has been drastically shifting its priorities throughout 2026.

item.title: Android enters its Gemini Intelligence era
item.description: Android enters its Gemini Intelligence era as Google transforms devices with AI-native features, new Gemini system integration, and innovative AI tools reshaping mobile computing.
item.content:encoded: Android enters its Gemini Intelligence era as Google transforms devices with AI-native features, new Gemini system integration, and innovative AI tools reshaping mobile computing.

item.title: Mira Murati's TML upends how humans work with AI
item.description: Mira Murati's TML launches interaction models, revolutionizing human-AI collaboration with real-time voice, video, and text capabilities for seamless workflows.
item.content:encoded: Mira Murati's TML launches interaction models, revolutionizing human-AI collaboration with real-time voice, video, and text capabilities for seamless workflows.

item.title: Google DeepMind’s powerful AI co-mathematician
item.description: Google DeepMind's AI co-mathematician breaks records with agentic approach, solving decades-old math problems and revolutionizing AI reasoning capabilities.
item.content:encoded: Google DeepMind's AI co-mathematician breaks records with agentic approach, solving decades-old math problems and revolutionizing AI reasoning capabilities.

item.title: OpenAI closes reasoning gap in voice agents
item.description: OpenAI's new voice agents feature advanced reasoning and real-time speech capabilities, enabling AI to handle complex tasks at natural conversation speed with improved tool use.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's new voice agents feature advanced reasoning and real-time speech capabilities, enabling AI to handle complex tasks at natural conversation speed with improved tool use.

item.title: Anthropic, SpaceX(AI) become unlikely compute partners
item.description: Anthropic and SpaceX's AI unit forge surprising compute partnership, with Musk renting Colossus cluster to rival Claude and reshaping the AI compute landscape.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic and SpaceX's AI unit forge surprising compute partnership, with Musk renting Colossus cluster to rival Claude and reshaping the AI compute landscape.

item.title: OpenAI's AI phone just jumped the line
item.description: OpenAI's AI phone is fast-tracked for 2027, bringing agentic capabilities to your pocket and intensifying competition in AI-powered devices and autonomous assistants.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's AI phone is fast-tracked for 2027, bringing agentic capabilities to your pocket and intensifying competition in AI-powered devices and autonomous assistants.

item.title: AI data centers head for the ocean
item.description: AI data centers head for the ocean with Panthalassa's $140M floating structures, plus how to replace Siri with a free local AI model. Discover the future of sustainable computing.
item.content:encoded: AI data centers head for the ocean with Panthalassa's $140M floating structures, plus how to replace Siri with a free local AI model. Discover the future of sustainable computing.

item.title: AI shows its skills in the emergency room
item.description: AI outperforms emergency room doctors in Harvard study, signaling a major shift in healthcare diagnostics and AI's clinical potential.
item.content:encoded: AI outperforms emergency room doctors in Harvard study, signaling a major shift in healthcare diagnostics and AI's clinical potential.

item.title: Exclusive: UiPath CMO Michael Atalla on AI at work
item.description: Why most AI projects fail, what the cloud era teaches us, and what the whole AI shift means for your job
item.content:encoded: Why most AI projects fail, what the cloud era teaches us, and what the whole AI shift means for your job

item.title: The White House rethinks its Anthropic fight
item.description: The White House reconsiders its stance on Anthropic as powerful new AI capabilities emerge, raising complex national security questions in the evolving AI regulation landscape.
item.content:encoded: The White House reconsiders its stance on Anthropic as powerful new AI capabilities emerge, raising complex national security questions in the evolving AI regulation landscape.

item.title: Zuckerberg's $500M AI biology swing
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg's biohub invests $500M in AI-powered virtual biology to revolutionize disease research and transform cellular-level understanding.
item.content:encoded: Mark Zuckerberg's biohub invests $500M in AI-powered virtual biology to revolutionize disease research and transform cellular-level understanding.

item.title: The biggest AI trial ever kicks off
item.description: AI's biggest rivalry heads to federal court as Musk's $130B trial against OpenAI kicks off with explosive testimony and private revelations.
item.content:encoded: AI's biggest rivalry heads to federal court as Musk's $130B trial against OpenAI kicks off with explosive testimony and private revelations.

item.title: OpenAI and Microsoft's new open relationship
item.description: OpenAI and Microsoft's evolving partnership opens doors for cloud alternatives like Amazon, while Microsoft maintains a lucrative but less exclusive role in the AI ecosystem.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI and Microsoft's evolving partnership opens doors for cloud alternatives like Amazon, while Microsoft maintains a lucrative but less exclusive role in the AI ecosystem.

item.title: DeepSeek resurfaces with cheap, capable V4
item.description: DeepSeek V4 emerges as a cheaper, capable AI model alternative. Plus: brand refresh strategies with Claude Design for modern creative workflows.
item.content:encoded: DeepSeek V4 emerges as a cheaper, capable AI model alternative. Plus: brand refresh strategies with Claude Design for modern creative workflows.

item.title: OpenAI's 'Spud' dethrones Claude on the frontier
item.description: OpenAI's new 'Spud' model surpasses Claude on AI leaderboards, marking a major shift in the AI frontier as Anthropic faces quality complaints.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's new 'Spud' model surpasses Claude on AI leaderboards, marking a major shift in the AI frontier as Anthropic faces quality complaints.

item.title: Anthropic's locked-down Mythos leaks
item.description: Anthropic's locked-down Mythos AI reportedly leaked to Discord users, raising serious concerns about AI safety and security protocols for powerful systems.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic's locked-down Mythos AI reportedly leaked to Discord users, raising serious concerns about AI safety and security protocols for powerful systems.

item.title: OpenAI reclaims the image crown
item.description: OpenAI reclaims the image generation crown with breakthrough AI technology. Plus, discover Claude Live Artifacts for building your daily command center.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI reclaims the image generation crown with breakthrough AI technology. Plus, discover Claude Live Artifacts for building your daily command center.

item.title: Sergey Brin commits DeepMind to a Claude catch-up
item.description: Sergey Brin leads DeepMind strike team to close Gemini's coding gap with Claude, as Google's co-founder tackles AI's next frontier in competitive AI development.
item.content:encoded: Sergey Brin leads DeepMind strike team to close Gemini's coding gap with Claude, as Google's co-founder tackles AI's next frontier in competitive AI development.

item.title: Claude comes for the design stack
item.description: Claude revolutionizes the design stack with AI-powered prototypes from prompts and screenshots. Plus: free coding agent for your laptop.
item.content:encoded: Claude revolutionizes the design stack with AI-powered prototypes from prompts and screenshots. Plus: free coding agent for your laptop.

item.title: Exclusive: Inside Canva AI 2.0 with CPO Cameron Adams
item.description: How Canva AI 2.0 changes design, productivity, and what it means to be great at your craft
item.content:encoded: How Canva AI 2.0 changes design, productivity, and what it means to be great at your craft

item.title: OpenAI's superapp hiding inside Codex
item.description: OpenAI ships major Codex update with superapp features like background computer use and parallel agents, signaling progress toward an all-in-one platform.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI ships major Codex update with superapp features like background computer use and parallel agents, signaling progress toward an all-in-one platform.

item.title: Allbirds ditches sneakers for AI compute
item.description: Allbirds pivots from sneakers to AI compute with $50M deal, sparking a 600% stock surge and the year's wildest AI transformation story.
item.content:encoded: Allbirds pivots from sneakers to AI compute with $50M deal, sparking a 600% stock surge and the year's wildest AI transformation story.

item.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.4-Cyber rejects Mythos playbook
item.description: OpenAI's GPT-5.4-Cyber challenges Anthropic's restricted Mythos approach, democratizing AI security by enabling broader defender access. Plus: automate Chrome with Gemini.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's GPT-5.4-Cyber challenges Anthropic's restricted Mythos approach, democratizing AI security by enabling broader defender access. Plus: automate Chrome with Gemini.

item.title: What happens when AI runs a retail store
item.description: AI takes the helm of a real retail store with $100k budget and full autonomy, revealing what happens when algorithms run operations and hire staff in San Francisco.
item.content:encoded: AI takes the helm of a real retail store with $100k budget and full autonomy, revealing what happens when algorithms run operations and hire staff in San Francisco.

item.title: Anti-AI anger hits Sam Altman's front door
item.description: Anti-AI anger escalates as protesters target Sam Altman's home amid growing fears about AI's societal impact and rapid technological changes reshaping the future.
item.content:encoded: Anti-AI anger escalates as protesters target Sam Altman's home amid growing fears about AI's societal impact and rapid technological changes reshaping the future.

item.title: Perplexity's agent pivot is on the money
item.description: Perplexity's agent pivot targets personal finance and taxes, signaling a shift beyond search with 50% monthly revenue growth and expanding AI capabilities.
item.content:encoded: Perplexity's agent pivot targets personal finance and taxes, signaling a shift beyond search with 50% monthly revenue growth and expanding AI capabilities.

item.title: Meta Superintelligence Labs ships its first model
item.description: Meta Superintelligence Labs releases its first AI model, positioning the tech giant back in the competitive race with powerful new capabilities and resources.
item.content:encoded: Meta Superintelligence Labs releases its first AI model, positioning the tech giant back in the competitive race with powerful new capabilities and resources.

item.title: Anthropic's new AI is too powerful for the world
item.description: Anthropic's new Claude Mythos AI is too powerful for public release, sparking debate about AI safety as it's deployed through a defensive cybersecurity coalition instead.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic's new Claude Mythos AI is too powerful for public release, sparking debate about AI safety as it's deployed through a defensive cybersecurity coalition instead.

item.title: Sam Altman's new 'social contract' for AI
item.description: Sam Altman proposes a "social contract" for AI: robot taxes, wealth funds, and a 4-day workweek to prepare society for unstoppable artificial intelligence.
item.content:encoded: Sam Altman proposes a "social contract" for AI: robot taxes, wealth funds, and a 4-day workweek to prepare society for unstoppable artificial intelligence.

item.title: Anthropic tells OpenClaw users to pay up
item.description: Anthropic cuts off OpenClaw users from Claude subscriptions, escalating pricing dispute with third-party agent platforms amid fierce AI competition.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic cuts off OpenClaw users from Claude subscriptions, escalating pricing dispute with third-party agent platforms amid fierce AI competition.

item.title: AI just made the billion-dollar solo founder real
item.description: AI makes billion-dollar solo founder possible—Matthew Gallagher's AI-powered telehealth startup Medvi hits $1.8B in sales from his LA home.
item.content:encoded: AI makes billion-dollar solo founder possible—Matthew Gallagher's AI-powered telehealth startup Medvi hits $1.8B in sales from his LA home.

item.title: Dorsey makes the AI case against managers
item.description: PLUS: Build a productivity tool with Replit
item.content:encoded: PLUS: Build a productivity tool with Replit

item.title: OpenAI’s new $122B funding, 'superapp'
item.description: OpenAI closes record $122B funding round at $852B valuation, positioning itself as AI industry leader despite recent controversies and challenges.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI closes record $122B funding round at $852B valuation, positioning itself as AI industry leader despite recent controversies and challenges.

item.title: OpenAI's $1B Disney blindside
item.description: OpenAI's $1B Disney blindside: Sora shutdown shocks the AI video world. Plus, build travel itineraries with Perplexity Computer in this week's AI update.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's $1B Disney blindside: Sora shutdown shocks the AI video world. Plus, build travel itineraries with Perplexity Computer in this week's AI update.

item.title: Anthropic's secret 'Mythos' model
item.description: Anthropic's secret 'Mythos' model leaks via CMS error, revealing an advanced AI tier with cybersecurity capabilities surpassing current frontier models.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic's secret 'Mythos' model leaks via CMS error, revealing an advanced AI tier with cybersecurity capabilities surpassing current frontier models.

item.title: An exclusive Q&A with alibaba.com's Kuo Zhang
item.description: How Accio Work is turning agent teams into operators across real-world workflows.
item.content:encoded: How Accio Work is turning agent teams into operators across real-world workflows.

item.title: Meta's new open-source brain AI
item.description: Meta's open-source brain AI predicts neural activity from visual and audio stimuli, advancing neuroscience research while raising questions about AI and advertising implications.
item.content:encoded: Meta's open-source brain AI predicts neural activity from visual and audio stimuli, advancing neuroscience research while raising questions about AI and advertising implications.

item.title: ARC-AGI-3 resets frontier AI scoreboard
item.description: ARC-AGI-3 resets the AI frontier scoreboard as top models struggle with only 1% scores, revealing how far we still are from AGI breakthroughs.
item.content:encoded: ARC-AGI-3 resets the AI frontier scoreboard as top models struggle with only 1% scores, revealing how far we still are from AGI breakthroughs.

item.title: OpenAI's Sora gets the axe
item.description: OpenAI discontinues Sora video generator, shifting focus to new 'Spud' model and intensifying competition with Anthropic's Claude in enterprise AI.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI discontinues Sora video generator, shifting focus to new 'Spud' model and intensifying competition with Anthropic's Claude in enterprise AI.

item.title: Anthropic's Claude gets remote control
item.description: Anthropic's Claude gains remote control capabilities, letting you manage tasks from your phone while the AI assistant handles your Mac directly—transforming Claude into a digital employee.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic's Claude gains remote control capabilities, letting you manage tasks from your phone while the AI assistant handles your Mac directly—transforming Claude into a digital employee.

item.title: Elon Musk's 'Terafab' AI chip factory
item.description: Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip factory aims to revolutionize compute production, uniting Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI in ambitious chip fabrication innovation.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip factory aims to revolutionize compute production, uniting Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI in ambitious chip fabrication innovation.

item.title: How 81K people really feel about AI
item.description: Discover what 81K people really think about AI: Anthropic's groundbreaking survey reveals nuanced public sentiment beyond simple hope or fear, spanning 70 languages worldwide.
item.content:encoded: Discover what 81K people really think about AI: Anthropic's groundbreaking survey reveals nuanced public sentiment beyond simple hope or fear, spanning 70 languages worldwide.
